mapper.select: SELECT -- 入库统计 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wms_inbound_order WHERE gmt_create >= #{startTime} AND gmt_create <= #{endTime} AND is_deleted = 0) AS inboundCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wms_inbound_order WHERE gmt_create >= #{startTime} AND gmt_create <= #{endTime} AND is_deleted = 0 AND order_status = 0) AS inboundPendingCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wms_inbound_order WHERE gmt_create >= #{startTime} AND gmt_create <= #{endTime} AND is_deleted = 0 AND order_status = 2) AS inboundCompletedCount, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_quantity), 0) FROM wms_inbound_order WHERE gmt_create >= #{startTime} AND gmt_create <= #{endTime} AND is_deleted = 0) AS inboundTotalQuantity, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM wms_inbound_order WHERE gmt_create >= #{startTime} AND gmt_create <= #{endTime} AND is_deleted = 0) AS inboundTotalAmount, -- 出库统计 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wms_outbound_order WHERE gmt_create >= #{startTime} AND gmt_create <= #{endTime} AND is_deleted = 0) AS outboundCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wms_outbound_order WHERE gmt_create >= #{startTime} AND gmt_create <= #{endTime} AND is_deleted = 0 AND order_status = 0) AS outboundPendingCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wms_outbound_order WHERE gmt_create >= #{startTime} AND gmt_create <= #{endTime} AND is_deleted = 0 AND order_status = 2) AS outboundCompletedCount, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_quantity), 0) FROM wms_outbound_order WHERE gmt_create >= #{startTime} AND gmt_create <= #{endTime} AND is_deleted = 0) AS outboundTotalQuantity, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM wms_outbound_order WHERE gmt_create >= #{startTime} AND gmt_create <= #{endTime} AND is_deleted = 0) AS outboundTotalAmount, -- 今日统计 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wms_inbound_order WHERE gmt_create >= CURDATE() AND gmt_create < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND is_deleted = 0) AS todayInbound, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wms_outbound_order WHERE gmt_create >= CURDATE() AND gmt_create < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND is_deleted = 0) AS todayOutbound, -- 库存总量 (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(quantity), 0) FROM wms_inventory WHERE is_deleted = 0) AS totalInventory

SELECT -- 商品总数 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wms_product WHERE is_deleted = 0) AS productCount, -- 仓库数量 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wms_warehouse WHERE is_deleted = 0) AS warehouseCount, -- 今日入库统计 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wms_inbound_order WHERE gmt_create >= CURDATE() AND gmt_create < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND is_deleted = 0 AND order_status = 2) AS todayInboundCount, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_quantity), 0) FROM wms_inbound_order WHERE gmt_create >= CURDATE() AND gmt_create < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND is_deleted = 0 AND order_status = 2) AS todayInboundQuantity, -- 今日出库统计 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wms_outbound_order WHERE gmt_create >= CURDATE() AND gmt_create < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND is_deleted = 0 AND order_status = 2) AS todayOutboundCount, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_quantity), 0) FROM wms_outbound_order WHERE gmt_create >= CURDATE() AND gmt_create < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND is_deleted = 0 AND order_status = 2) AS todayOutboundQuantity, -- 库存总量 (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(quantity), 0) FROM wms_inventory WHERE is_deleted = 0) AS totalInventoryQuantity

SELECT DATE(gmt_create) AS date, COALESCE(SUM(total_quantity), 0) AS count FROM wms_inbound_order WHERE gmt_create >= #{startTime} AND gmt_create <= #{endTime} AND is_deleted = 0 AND order_status = 2 GROUP BY DATE(gmt_create) ORDER BY DATE(gmt_create)

SELECT DATE(gmt_create) AS date, COALESCE(SUM(total_quantity), 0) AS count FROM wms_outbound_order WHERE gmt_create >= #{startTime} AND gmt_create <= #{endTime} AND is_deleted = 0 AND order_status = 2 GROUP BY DATE(gmt_create) ORDER BY DATE(gmt_create)

SELECT p.product_name AS productName, COALESCE(SUM(i.quantity), 0) AS quantity FROM wms_inbound_order_item i INNER JOIN wms_inbound_order o ON i.order_id = o.id INNER JOIN wms_product p ON i.product_id = p.id WHERE o.gmt_create >= #{startTime} AND o.gmt_create <= #{endTime} AND o.is_deleted = 0 AND i.is_deleted = 0 AND o.order_status = 2 GROUP BY i.product_id, p.product_name ORDER BY quantity DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT p.product_name AS productName, COALESCE(SUM(i.quantity), 0) AS quantity FROM wms_outbound_order_item i INNER JOIN wms_outbound_order o ON i.order_id = o.id INNER JOIN wms_product p ON i.product_id = p.id WHERE o.gmt_create >= #{startTime} AND o.gmt_create <= #{endTime} AND o.is_deleted = 0 AND i.is_deleted = 0 AND o.order_status = 2 GROUP BY i.product_id, p.product_name ORDER BY quantity DESC LIMIT #{limit}
